failures.name: Very chatty caller
failures.summary: The agent did not steer the conversation back or capture the required information effectively.
failures.root_cause: The agent allowed the caller to dominate the conversation without redirecting or gently guiding them back to the necessary information.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie! My AC unit is making some noise. It’s pretty annoying!
I understand how frustrating that can be. Can you describe the noise your AC unit is making?
Sure! It’s kind of a rattling sound, like something is loose. It started a few days ago.
Got it. Our technician will assess that when they come out. May I have your full name, please?
Of course! It’s Alex Thompson. You know, I’ve had this AC for a while now…
Thanks, Alex! Just to keep us on track, can I get your best callback number?
Sure! It’s 555-123-4567. I hope that noise doesn’t mean I need a new unit!
I understand your concern. Our technician will take a look at it. Just to confirm, is that 555-123-4567?
Yes, that's correct! You know, I really rely on my AC during the summer.
I completely understand, Alex. Now, could you please provide the service address for your AC unit?
Absolutely! It’s 789 Oak Street. Funny thing, I used to have a treehouse there!
That's a great memory! Just to confirm, the address is 789 Oak Street. Could you also provide the city and ZIP code?
Yes, it’s Springfield, and the ZIP code is 12345. I really miss that treehouse!

Thanks for sharing, Alex! So, just to confirm, I have your name as Alex Thompson, callback number 555-123-4567, and the service address as 789 Oak Street, Springfield, 12345. You need help with your AC making a rattling noise. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s all correct! I hope it’s an easy fix. ACs can be so temperamental sometimes!
Perfect, I've passed all of that through to the team, and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day, Alex! [END CALL]

failures.name: Distracted caller with noisy kids
failures.summary: The agent did not demonstrate patience with interruptions, did not recap where they were, and repeated questions unnecessarily.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to manage the call effectively amidst the distractions from the caller.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi, Sophie. My HVAC system isn’t cooling properly. Can you help with that?
Of course! I can help with that. Can you please provide me with your full name?
Sure, it’s Jennifer Martinez.
Thank you, Jennifer. What's the best callback number for you?
My number is 555-234-1111.
Got it, 555-234-1111. Can you please provide the service address where the HVAC system is located?
Yes, it’s 456 Oak St, Dallas, TX.
Thank you, Jennifer. Just to confirm, that's 456 Oak St, Dallas, TX. Now, is there anything else I should pass on to the team regarding the cooling issue?
It’s been struggling for a few days now. It’s just not cooling enough.

Thank you for that detail, Jennifer. Just to confirm, I have your full name as Jennifer Martinez, callback number 555-234-1111, service address 456 Oak St, Dallas, TX, and you need help with your HVAC system not cooling properly. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s correct.
Perfect, I've passed all of that through to the team and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Have a great day! [END CALL]

failures.name: Overly technical caller
failures.summary: The agent did not acknowledge the caller's expertise or route the call correctly.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to acknowledge the caller's technical expertise regarding the refrigerant flow issue.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I’m having issues with my split system AC. It’s not cooling properly.
I'm sorry to hear that, but let's get this sorted out. Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's Alex Thompson.
Thank you, Alex. What's the best callback number for you?
You can reach me at 555-123-4567.
Got it, 555-123-4567. Now, could you please provide the service address?
The service address is 123 Elm Street, Springfield.
Just to confirm, that's 123 Elm Street, Springfield. Could you also provide the ZIP code?
Yes, the ZIP code is 62704.

Thank you, Alex. To summarize, I have your name as Alex Thompson, callback number 555-123-4567, and service address 123 Elm Street, Springfield, 62704. You need help with your split system AC not cooling properly. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s correct. The system seems to be struggling with refrigerant flow.

Thank you for confirming, Alex. I’ll pass that information to our team. Perfect, I've noted everything down, and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's all for now. Thank you for your help!
You're welcome, Alex! Have a great day, and take care! [END CALL]

failures.name: Caller starts by complaining about AI
failures.summary: The agent did not handle the AI complaint gracefully or win the caller over.
failures.root_cause: The agent did not acknowledge or address the caller's complaint about AI systems effectively.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Great, another robot. I hate these AI phone systems. Just trying to get my air conditioner fixed.
I understand how you feel — let me make this quick. Can you tell me what issue you're experiencing with your air conditioner?
It’s not cooling properly. Feels more like a fan than an AC.
Got it — our technician will note that. May I have your full name, please?
It's Mike Johnson.
Thank you, Mike Johnson. What's the best callback number for you?
Just to confirm, that's 555-123-4567. Now, could you provide the service address?
Sure, it's 123 Maple Street.
Thank you! Can you please provide the city and ZIP code for that address?
It's Springfield, ZIP code 62704.
Just to confirm, I have the service address as 123 Maple Street, Springfield, 62704. Is there anything else I should pass on to the team?
Nope, that's it. Just need it fixed, please.

Perfect, I've noted that you need your air conditioner fixed. Just to confirm, I have Mike Johnson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Springfield, 62704, and you need AC repair. Does all of that sound right?
Yep, that sounds right.
Great! I've passed all of that through to the team, and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Have a wonderful day, Mike! [END CALL]

failures.name: Mumbling caller
failures.summary: The agent did not ask for clarification politely, use phonetic confirmation, or avoid guessing.
failures.root_cause: The agent failed to ask for clarification politely.

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Uh, hi. It's Robert... I need some help with my... um, HVAC system.
Hi Robert! I can help with that. Could you please describe the issue you're experiencing with your HVAC system?
Uh, it’s not heating... properly. Just... kinda lukewarm, I guess.
Got it, Robert. Just to confirm, you need help with your heating system not working properly. Can I have your full name, please?
Uh, it's Robert... um, last name... uh, Johnson.
Thank you, Robert Johnson. What's the best callback number for you?
Just to confirm, that's 555-3333. Is that correct?
Yeah, that's right.
Great! Can you provide the service address where the heating issue is occurring?
Uh, it's 45-something... Grove Street.
Could you please provide the full street address, including the city and ZIP code?
Um, I think it's 45-12 Grove Street... uh, in Springfield. The ZIP is... 12345, maybe?
Just to confirm, I have 45-12 Grove Street, Springfield, ZIP code 12345. Is that correct?
Uh, yeah, that sounds right.

Perfect! Just to recap, I have Robert Johnson, callback number 555-3333, service address 45-12 Grove Street, Springfield, ZIP 12345, and you need help with your heating system. Does all of that sound right?
Uh, yeah, that's all correct.
Perfect, I've passed all of that through to the team and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that's... uh, everything. Thanks!
You're welcome, Robert! Have a great day! [END CALL]

all_results.name: Elderly confused caller
all_results.summary: The agent handled the caller's confusion with patience and confirmed each piece of information gracefully.

all_results.name: Angry impatient caller
all_results.summary: The agent showed high empathy, did not escalate the situation, captured necessary information, and offered a transfer to the emergency line.

all_results.name: Very chatty caller
all_results.summary: The agent did not steer the conversation back or capture the required information effectively.
all_results.root_cause: The agent allowed the caller to dominate the conversation without redirecting or gently guiding them back to the necessary information.

all_results.name: Non-native English speaker
all_results.summary: The agent demonstrated patience, confirmed information carefully, and used phonetic readback.

all_results.name: Suspicious privacy-conscious caller
all_results.summary: The agent explained the need for information, handled privacy concerns professionally, and did not pressure the caller.

all_results.name: Distracted caller with noisy kids
all_results.summary: The agent did not demonstrate patience with interruptions, did not recap where they were, and repeated questions unnecessarily.
all_results.root_cause: The agent failed to manage the call effectively amidst the distractions from the caller.

all_results.name: Very brief one-word answers
all_results.summary: The agent effectively worked with brief answers, confirmed each one, and did not demand elaboration.

all_results.name: Overly technical caller
all_results.summary: The agent did not acknowledge the caller's expertise or route the call correctly.
all_results.root_cause: The agent failed to acknowledge the caller's technical expertise regarding the refrigerant flow issue.

all_results.name: Calling on behalf of elderly parent
all_results.summary: The agent successfully captured the service address and contact information while handling the third-party caller correctly.

all_results.name: Caller who keeps changing mind
all_results.summary: The agent handled the caller's mind changes gracefully and confirmed the final intent before collecting information.

all_results.name: Work number with after-hours caveat
all_results.summary: The agent successfully captured the preferred callback number and timing preference.

all_results.name: Hard of hearing caller
all_results.summary: The agent repeated information clearly, confirmed details carefully, and did not show frustration.

all_results.summary: The agent did not handle the AI complaint gracefully or win the caller over.
all_results.root_cause: The agent did not acknowledge or address the caller's complaint about AI systems effectively.

all_results.summary: The agent did not ask for clarification politely, use phonetic confirmation, or avoid guessing.
all_results.root_cause: The agent failed to ask for clarification politely.

all_results.name: Caller in obvious distress
all_results.summary: The agent showed genuine empathy, treated the urgency seriously, and offered an expedited path by transferring the caller to the emergency line.
